title: Platform Extraction Output
description: Standardized JSON output from each platform extraction agent. All monetary values are raw numbers (no formatting). Formatting is applied by the aggregation script. Updated April 2026: removed gross_sales (tax-inclusive), added commissions, net_sales, other_adjustments. Net Payout is now calculated from components.

payout_reconciliation.description: Difference between calculated Net Payout and platform payout column (minus tax). Should be < 2%.

total_sales.description: Food subtotal excl tax, incl discounts. Was 'total_net_sales'. Top-line revenue.

net_sales.description: Total Sales - Discounts. NEW. What merchant keeps from food sales before fees.

commissions.description: Platform commission fees (absolute value). NEW. UE=Marketplace Fee, DD=Commission, GH=commission+delivery_commission.

ad_spend.description: Net ad spend (after credits for UE, from portal for DD enterprise, $0 for GH unless separate report).

other_adjustments.description: Refunds, error charges, processing fees, merchant fees, misc. NEW. Single net number.

net_payout.description: CALCULATED: Net Sales - Commissions - Ad Spend - Other Adjustments. Tax-normalized, comparable across platforms.

net_payout_pct.description: Net Payout / Total Sales * 100. Comparable across all platforms.

marketing_investment_pct.description: Total Marketing Investment / Total Sales * 100. How much of sales goes to marketing.

marketing_roas.description: Marketing Driven Sales / Total Marketing Investment. Null if no marketing spend.

marketing_cpo.description: Total Marketing Investment / Orders from Marketing. Null if no marketing orders.

platform_payout_column.description: Raw payout from platform CSV. For validation only. UE=Total payout, DD=Net total, GH=merchant_net_total.

platform_tax_passed.description: Tax passed through in payout. For validation. UE=MF Tax (already deducted), DD=Tax(subtotal), GH=subtotal_sales_tax.

_formatting_rules.note: Applied by aggregation script, NOT by extraction agents
_formatting_rules.roas: X.X (1 decimal place, NO x suffix)

_removed_fields.note: Removed April 2026 to align with client framework
_removed_fields.gross_sales: Tax-inclusive. Removed because tax treatment differs by platform, making cross-platform comparisons misleading.
_removed_fields.marketing_investment_pct: Restored April 2026. Kept as useful efficiency metric.
_removed_fields.marketing_cpo: Restored April 2026. Kept as useful cost-per-order metric.
_removed_fields.net_payout_pct_old_formula: Was Net Payout / Gross Sales. Now Net Payout / Total Sales.
